# Chainlink VRF Documentation

> Product-level navigation index for Chainlink Verifiable Random Function documentation.

Prefer VRF v2.5 for new VRF integrations. Use older VRF versions only for migration or maintenance.

Do not rely on memorized supported networks, subscription details, billing details, or coordinator addresses.

## Overview and Setup

- [Overview](https://docs.chain.link/vrf.md)
- [Getting Started with VRF v2.5](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/v2-5/getting-started.md)
- [Supported Networks](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/v2-5/supported-networks.md)

## Billing Models

- [Billing](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/v2-5/billing.md)
- [Subscription Overview](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/v2-5/overview/subscription.md)
- [Direct Funding Overview](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/v2-5/overview/direct-funding.md)

## Guides

- [Create and Manage Subscriptions](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/v2-5/subscription/create-manage.md)
- [Get a Random Number with Subscription](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/v2-5/subscription/get-a-random-number.md)
- [Get a Random Number with Direct Funding](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/v2-5/direct-funding/get-a-random-number.md)

## Safety and Migration

- [Best Practices](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/v2-5/best-practices.md)
- [Security](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/v2-5/security.md)
- [Migration from VRF v1](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/v2-5/migration-from-v1.md)
- [Migration from VRF v2](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/v2-5/migration-from-v2.md)

## Full Context

- [VRF Full](https://docs.chain.link/vrf/llms-full.txt)
